title: Letters
content:
Every day brings a ship,
    Every ship brings a word;
    Well for those who have no fear.
    Looking seaward, well assured
    That the word the vessel brings
    Is the word they wish to hear.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ralph Waldo Emerson, titled "Letters", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
